"You've Got Friends!"
Andy Jenkins here.

In the last couple of weeks we've released four cutting-edge videos and one amazing Strategy Guide.

But I've got to admit - I've held out on you on one thing�

And that's our "You've Got Friends" program.

Let me explain� where you ever the "new kid" in school?

It's not a comfortable feeling - you show up for school and everyone knows everyone else, but you don't know anyone. You're the outsider.

Maybe you didn't experience that in school, but I'm sure you've felt it other times. The new guy or girl at work. Or you walk into a party and you don't know anyone.

I don't know about you, but when I'm in those situations� it just takes one or two friends, and then all of a sudden things get a whole lot easier. But finding those first few friends is never easy for me.

Well, social media can be the same way. If you don't have any friends on Facebook, if you don't have any buddies to give you Diggs, if your Myspace page looks like a ghost town� well, then you lose most of the power of social marketing.

But I've got your back�

As part of our SMARTS Coaching Program we have a special "You've Got Friends" component that will give you instant traction in your social marketing campaign.

This isn't going to be some bogus black-hat technique. We are going to use the community power of SMARTS, and create your web of friends, links, and bookmarks - right inside the Coaching Program.

Presto� you've got friends. You've got a network.

The bottom line� you are not alone. You've got instant traction on all those Social Marketing sites that we're going to be teaching you how to use. You've got friends.

The last thing we would ever do is just teach you some theory. This Coaching Program is all about you actually creating an effective, integrated Social Marketing campaign. One that is driving traffic and enhancing your reputation before the program is even half over.

And to do that, we've eliminated every possible roadblock. We don't want you to be "the new kid" at school. That's not going to happen to you - because "You've Got Friends".

OK, that's it for now� I have a million details to take care of before we release the SMARTS Coaching Program tomorrow.

IMPORTANT: earlier we said that we were going to be releasing the Coaching Program at 12 noon on Friday. We've now moved that back two hours - to 2:00pm eastern time on Friday.

If you have any questions about the program, please leave them on our blog in the comments section of this post� that's the quickest way to get a response right now.

Best Regards,
Andy
